signals.reconciliation_hint: SPLIT: brain confidence only 62% (HOLD); legacy says LONG. The brains aren't sure here — lean on the data. Your call.

brain_consensus.narrative: Fear has a stranglehold on the market as the Fear & Greed Index plunges to 31, yet stablecoin growth quietly signals dry powder is accumulating on the sidelines. This is the same anxious DNA we saw in August 2024, where a coiled market absorbed final sellers before resolving higher. The silence in momentum is deafening—and historically, that silence has been a buyer's opportunity.
brain_consensus.headline: Fear Grips, But Sidelines Are Loading

next_move.reasoning: Score sits at 31 (Fear/Greed) placing us in Anxiety band (39-46 is Complacency, but composite score from all factors likely mid-40s; Fear/Greed at 31 anchors lower). Historical match to August 2024 bottom shows 78.8% similarity but ETF flows at 100 vs 55 and VIX at 66 vs 38 are massive divergences — this is NOT the same disbelief setup. MVRV_zscore NEGATIVE divergence (-16) shows less undervaluation now. My 0-for-18 record screams: the coil statistics (0% of 12h windows moved ±2+ points in 7 days) are the honest read. Forced directional calls failed; HOLD with specific breaker identification is the disciplined play. The breaker I need: funding flipping positive + BTC momentum breaking above 60 would signal UP; VIX spiking above 20 + DXY breaking 102 would signal DOWN. Neither is present.
next_move.confirmed_if: HOLD: score stays within Anxiety/Complacency band (39-54) for next 2-3 readings; directional confirmation requires funding turning sustainably positive with ETF flow persistence above 80 AND VIX compression below 15
next_move.invalidated_if: Fear/Greed drops below 24 (Panic territory) OR funding spikes above 0.01% with BTC momentum clearing 65 (would signal Disbelief/Hope transition); VIX above 20 with DXY above 102 would invalidate HOLD for REDUCE

narrative.headline: Fear Grips, But Sidelines Are Loading

next_move.reasoning: With 0 of 36 windows showing ±2+ movement and neither directional breaker present, the coil statistics dominate and HOLD wins by default until funding flips positive or VIX spikes.
